case_title: PATEL, RAMESH P. vs. ARMSTRONG, PHILIP et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, PHILIP COPELAND, EVELYN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, PHILIP ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT COPELAND, EVELYN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, PHILIP COPELAND, EVELYN
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-23-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: CASE WAS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. #5 FOR A COURT TRIAL, DEFT. WAS PRESENT.(DEFT. HAD NEVER DEMANDED A JURY AND WAS INFORMED BY THE CLERK IN #5 THAT IT WOULD BE HEARD AS A COURT TRIAL) (DEFT, EVELYN COPELAND WAS NEVER PRESENT) DEFT. LEFT THE COURTROOM AND RETURNED TO DEPT. #1 WHERE HE WAS INFORMED BY THE JUDGE THAT HE COULD NOT REQUEST A JURY TRIAL AT THIS LATE DATE AND TO RETURN TO #5 FOR HIS COURT TRIAL. DEFT. DID NOT RETURN TO DEPT. #5, AND THE CASE WAS RE- ASSIGNED TO DEPT. #1 FOR A PROVE-UP. MR. LITTMAN, ATTY. FOR THE PLTF, ASKED THAT THE RECORD REFLECT, THAT MR. ARMSTRONG HAD NOT RETURNED TO DEPT. #5 AS INSTRUCTED AND THAT MORE THAN AN HOUR HAD PASSED. CT. TRIAL W/OUT THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFT. WAS PUT ON THE RECORD IN DEPT. #1

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, PHILIP COPELAND, EVELYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH ST, #425 $456.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $456.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WAIVES ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS; WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY (NO STAYS), (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, PHILIP COPELAND, EVELYN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, PHILIP COPELAND, EVELYN
